title: Retired Standalone Studio Audit HTTP Wrapper
summary: Removed the standalone Studio audit HTTP service, moved reusable allowlisted audit execution into a direct audit runner, and kept browser audit routes served through the local Studio app API.
effect: Local Studio now has one fewer sibling localhost service. Browser audit workflows remain on `/studio/api/audits/...`, while Codex and direct automation can run allowlisted audits through `scripts/studio/audit_runner.py` without starting an HTTP wrapper.
verification: python3 -m py_compile scripts/studio/audit_runner.py scripts/studio/studio_audit_api.py scripts/studio/studio_app_server.py scripts/run_checks.py tests/smoke/local_studio_app_audits_route.py
